title: Old new game
description: This client modpack makes the new minecraft look like old versions of the game, improves the atmosphere, and adds optimizations
body:
**The purpose of this modpack is to recreate the atmosphere and visual of old minecraft under version 1.21.8, textures have been changed to be in texture style before update 1.14, added improved fog and other details, also adds optimization for comfortable game play**![What the blocks look like in a modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7caaf2e81589d25f904550aed1c0e99fbb840b38.png)

<details>
<summary>Mods / Resourcepacks</summary>
 
- Architectury
- Better Third Person
- Cloth Config
- Concurrent Chunk Menegement Engine
- Continuity
- CreativeCore
- Debugify
- Dynamic FPS
- Dynamic Lights
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FastQuit
- FarriteCore
- Fog
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris
- Krypton
- Lithium
- M.R.U
- Mod Menu
- Particle Rain
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sound Physics Remastered
- YetAnotherCongigLib
- golden-days-base

</details>
